title: stellaria cherleriae var. minor
intro: Stellaria cherleriae var. minor, also known as Lesser Starwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Lesser Starwort include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Lesser Starwort can be used as a tincture or infusion, often combined with other herbs to create a tonic for colds and flu.
